title: Implement internationalization (i18n)
original_text: Implemented full internationalization support. Added translation files for English, Spanish, French, German, and Japanese. Implemented locale detection and switching. Added date/time formatting per locale. Implemented number and currency formatting per locale. Added RTL (right-to-left) support for Arabic. Implemented translation management system. Added tests for i18n functionality. Result: 61 tests pass.
expected_command: git commit -m "feat(i18n): implement full internationalization support"
